name: Menu Select
description: Game menu cursor highlighting an option

prompts.label: game menu cursor moving to highlight option with blip
prompts.text: game menu cursor moving to highlight option with blip, NES coin-collect jingle, bitcrushed square wave blip, arcade cabinet excitement, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay

prompts.label: 8-bit selection indicator with crisp square wave tick
prompts.text: 8-bit selection indicator with crisp square wave tick, pixel game power-up, pulse wave arpeggio, joystick-era nostalgia, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, punchy, smooth fade out

prompts.label: pixel arrow pointing at menu choice with confirmation tone
prompts.text: pixel arrow pointing at menu choice with confirmation tone, Game Boy startup melody, triangle wave bass note, high-score elation, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, bright, sustained resonance

prompts.label: retro interface navigation with clean chiptune cursor sound
prompts.text: retro interface navigation with clean chiptune cursor sound, SID chip tracker groove, noise channel snare hit, speed-run intensity, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay

prompts.label: NES menu highlight with brief ascending pulse
prompts.text: NES menu highlight with brief ascending pulse, 16-bit victory screen, lo-fi sample playback crunch, bonus-stage energy, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, punchy, smooth fade out
